prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there, champ! You've got this! Remember, the hardest part is starting, and you're about to crush that. Break it down into smaller bits if you need to—one step at a time. You've tackled tough tasks before, and this is no different. You're capable, strong, and ready to take this on. Get in there and show this task who's boss! You'll feel amazing once it's done. Now go for it!
